zh.Betws-yn-rhos, Denbighshire, Wales, Unit: 英國威爾斯丹比爾貝特福--斯
zh.Llanedwen, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingd: 威爾士安格萊利阿內德文
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian verch Kenric於大約1156年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾貝特福--斯時，她的父親Cynwrig ap Iorwerth35歲，母親Angharad verch Hwfa23歲。她於大約1177年與Iorwerth ap Hwfa在英國威爾斯尼德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Llanedwen, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingd: 威尔士安格萊利阿內德文
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian verch Kenric于大约1156年出生在英国威尔斯丹比爾貝特福--斯时，她的父亲Cynwrig ap Iorwerth35岁，母亲Angharad verch Hwfa23岁。她于大约1177年与Iorwerth ap Hwfa在英国威尔斯尼德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Kenric
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Cynwrig, from cyn ‘chief, first’ + an uncertain second element.

variants.name: Kendrick
meanings: Scottish and Irish: shortened form of   McKendrick  .

variants.name: Kerrick
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of   Kenrick   or   Kerridge  .
Americanized form of German   Gericke  . Compare   Gerrick  .

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian verch Kenric was born about 1156, in Betws-yn-rhos, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Cynwrig ap Iorwerth, was 35 and her mother, Angharad verch Hwfa, was 23. She married Iorwerth ap Hwfa about 1177, in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.Betws-yn-rhos, Denbighshire, Wales, Unit: Betws-yn-rhos, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian verch Kenric est née environ 1156, à Betws-yn-rhos, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Cynwrig ap Iorwerth, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Angharad verch Hwfa, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Iorwerth ap Hwfa environ 1177, à Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian verch Kenric um 1156 in Betws-yn-rhos, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Cynwrig ap Iorwerth 35 und ihre Mutter Angharad verch Hwfa 23. Sie hat um 1177 in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom Iorwerth ap Hwfa geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian verch Kenric è nata il circa 1156 nel Betws-yn-rhos, Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Cynwrig ap Iorwerth, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Angharad verch Hwfa, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Iorwerth ap Hwfa circa 1177, nel Gwynedd, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Kenricが約1156年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアベトウス-イン-ロースで生まれた時，父Cynwrig ap Iorwerthは35歳，母Angharad verch Hwfaは23歳であった。約1177年にイギリスウェールズグウイネッドでIorwerth ap Hwfaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Kenric(이)가 대략 1156년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 베트w스-이-호스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Cynwrig ap Iorwerth(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Angharad verch Hwfa(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1177년 영국 웨일스 그윈드에서 Iorwerth ap Hwfa(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian verch Kenric nasceu aproximadamente 1156, em Betws-yn-rhos, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Cynwrig ap Iorwerth, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Angharad verch Hwfa, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Iorwerth ap Hwfa aproximadamente 1177, em Gwynedd, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian verch Kenric родилась около 1156 г. в местности бетвс-ин-рос, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Cynwrig ap Iorwerth было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad verch Hwfa, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Iorwerth ap Hwfa около 1177 г. в местности гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenllian verch Kenric nació aproximadamente 1156, en Betws-yn-rhos, Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Cynwrig ap Iorwerth, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Angharad verch Hwfa, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Iorwerth ap Hwfa aproximadamente 1177, en Gwynedd, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
